items.name: all
items.title: All
items.description: Shortcut that installs every item from this registry.

items.name: tv-pick
items.title: TV Pick Utility
items.description: Utility for picking and processing Tailwind Variants props with type-safe data attributes

items.name: poly
items.title: Poly Component
items.description: Polymorphic React component with Tailwind Variants support for creating flexible, reusable components

items.name: poly-astro
items.title: Poly Astro Component
items.description: Polymorphic Astro component with Tailwind Variants support for creating flexible, reusable Astro components

items.name: use-stable-value
items.title: useStableValue Hook
items.description: A React hook that returns a referentially stable value bound to the latest value instance.

items.name: use-stable-callback
items.title: useStableCallback Hook
items.description: A React hook that returns a referentially stable callback bound to the latest function instance.

items.name: use-combined-refs
items.title: useCombinedRefs Hook
items.description: Combine multiple React refs into a single stable callback ref.

items.name: use-state-with-deps
items.title: useStateWithDeps Hook
items.description: A state hook that recomputes its initial value when dependencies change.

items.name: use-deps-changed
items.title: useDepsChanged Hook
items.description: A hook that checks if dependencies have changed.

items.name: use-deps-version
items.title: useDepsVersion Hook
items.description: A hook that returns a version number that increments when dependencies change.

items.name: use-constant
items.title: useConstant Hook
items.description: Create a lazily initialized constant that persists for the lifetime of a component.

items.name: is-function
items.title: isFunction Utility
items.description: Type-safe function type guard that extracts a typesafe function type from a union of function and non-function types.

items.name: apply-update
items.title: Apply Update Utility
items.description: Utilities for applying state updates with support for both direct values and updater functions.

items.name: deferred
items.title: Deferred Promise
items.description: A Promise subclass that can be resolved or rejected externally, with status tracking, timeout, and polling support.

items.name: start-view-transition
items.title: startViewTransition Utility
items.description: A wrapper around the View Transitions API with React flushSync support, typed transitions, and graceful fallback for unsupported browsers.

items.name: spring
items.title: Spring Utility
items.description: A basic spring physics simulation utility.

items.name: replace-equal-deep
items.title: replaceEqualDeep Utility
items.description: Deep structural sharing utility that preserves referential equality for unchanged subtrees of plain objects and arrays.

items.name: use-previous
items.title: usePrevious Hook
items.description: Returns the previous value of a passed value, with a customizable equality function.

items.name: use-identity
items.title: useIdentity Hook
items.description: Returns a referentially stable value as long as a derived identity stays the same.

items.name: use-expired-state
items.title: useExpiredState Hook
items.description: Returns one state value before an expiration timestamp and another after, scheduling a re-render when it expires.

items.name: use-promise
items.title: usePromise Hook
items.description: Resolves a promise into state with an optional default value and optional Suspense support.

items.name: use-lazy-module
items.title: useLazyModule Hook
items.description: Lazily loads and caches a module by key, exposing the instance once resolved.

items.name: use-structural-sharing
items.title: useStructuralSharing Hook
items.description: Memoizes a value with deep structural sharing so unchanged subtrees keep their references.

items.name: use-structural-state
items.title: useStructuralState Hook
items.description: A useState variant that applies deep structural sharing to avoid re-renders when the new state is deeply equal.

items.name: use-control
items.title: useControl Hook
items.description: Unifies controlled and uncontrolled state into a single API, with optional default/final values and dependency-based resets.

items.name: use-array-control
items.title: useArrayControl Hook
items.description: Controlled/uncontrolled state hook for arrays with append, insert, upsert, modify, remove, toggle, reorder, and stable React keys.

items.name: use-record-control
items.title: useRecordControl Hook
items.description: Controlled/uncontrolled state hook for record/dictionary values with set, merge, rename, remove, and key-order helpers.

items.name: use-immer-control
items.title: useImmerControl Hook
items.description: A useControl variant that accepts Immer recipe updaters for ergonomic deep updates.

items.name: use-pending-control
items.title: usePendingControl Hook
items.description: A useControl variant that buffers a pending value locally and only fires onChange when explicitly submitted, with reset and skip-pending support.

items.name: scroll-utils
items.title: Scroll Utilities
items.description: Tailwind v4 utilities for auto-hiding thin scrollbars and scroll-driven fade masks. Exposes `scrollable`, `scrollable-always`, `scrollable-transition`, `scroll-fade`, `scroll-fade-inline`, and `scroll-fade-both`.

items.name: remove-default-colors
items.title: Remove Default Tailwind Colors
items.description: Removes all default Tailwind CSS color palettes from @theme to declutter autocomplete. Selectively comment-out colors to keep specific palettes.
